nameCn: 从ClickFix到命令：完整的PowerShell攻击链
nameEn: From ClickFix to Command: A Full PowerShell Attack Chain
contentSummaryCn: 我们观察到一个针对以色列组织的区域性PowerShell攻击链，攻击者利用钓鱼邮件诱骗用户执行恶意PowerShell脚本，最终部署远程访问木马（RAT）。攻击链完全使用PowerShell执行，利用多种混淆技术逃避检测。
contentSummaryEn: We observed a regional PowerShell-based attack chain targeting Israeli organizations. Attackers used phishing emails to lure victims into executing malicious PowerShell scripts, ultimately deploying a Remote Access Trojan (RAT). The entire attack chain was executed via PowerShell, employing multiple obfuscation techniques to evade detection.
contentDetailCn:
初始访问：攻击者发送钓鱼邮件，伪装成“战时医疗物资使用培训”邀请，诱导用户点击恶意链接。
载荷执行：受害者点击链接后，被引导至伪造的Microsoft Teams页面，随后被诱骗运行PowerShell命令。
载荷混淆：攻击者使用多层Base64编码和字符串拼接技术隐藏恶意脚本。
C2通信：脚本硬编码C2服务器（pharmacynod[.]com），通过HTTPS通信，支持多种指令（如文件下载、远程代码执行）。
MITRE ATT&CK映射：T1059 (PowerShell)、T1071 (HTTP C2)、T1105 (远程文件下载)。
contentDetailEn:
Initial Access: Attackers sent phishing emails disguised as "wartime medical training" invitations, tricking users into clicking malicious links.
Payload Execution: Victims were redirected to a spoofed Microsoft Teams page and tricked into running PowerShell commands.
Payload Obfuscation: The scripts used multi-layer Base64 encoding and string concatenation to hide malicious code.
C2 Communication: Hardcoded C2 server (pharmacynod[.]com) communicated over HTTPS, supporting commands like file download and remote execution.
MITRE ATT&CK Mapping: T1059 (PowerShell), T1071 (HTTP C2), T1105 (Remote File Download).
Tags：#PowerShell #RAT #Phishing #Obfuscation #MuddyWater #Israel
author: 威胁情报运营团队
